label: Margin, ranking & metric objectives

node.label: Margin, ranking & metric objectives
node.definition: Relative similarity or ordering is optimized instead of only class probability.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Margin, ranking & metric objectives is to connect Supervised learning, Preference learning to downstream capabilities including Reward modeling, External retrieval & ranking, Support vector & kernel machines.
examples: substrate for Support vector & kernel machines
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Preference learning.

dependencies.rationale: Margin, ranking & metric objectives uses Supervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Margin, ranking & metric objectives uses Preference learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Margin, ranking & metric objectives uses Embeddings & distributed representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
